summary: WIN-010 c5 H4 (moderate) — Chapman-qualitative advocate prong. Closed automatically by EXP-220 Meza→Kim & Chang swap (ISS-1391). Paragraph 1 now cites both Chapman (1933) and Kim & Chang (2018, 39-eclipse INTERMAGNET ensemble, mag-lat 30°–50° Y-component pattern) — peer-reviewed modern quantitative confirmation of Chapman framework, not a free-parameter rescue. All five c5 issues (ISS-1390/1391/1392/1393/1394) resolved by the single EXP-220 patch. Please integrate and close.
